column3: Amount of games and percentages, will be modified, might be too complicated to put in the game, maybe something for the future
Change of coach during the season.
Coach can't change before the halfmark of a season, after that these criteria sets in.
5 losses in a row starts the chance of firing
5 losses 10% chance middle of season coach change
Any win in between losses takes the chance down 2 steps. For example 8 losses in a row, wins, then the next game only counts as the coach has 6 losses in a row.
8 games in a row without a win starts the chance of firing
Any win in between losses takes the chance down 3 steps. For example 11 games in a row without a win, the team wins, then the next game only counts as the coach has 8 games in a row without win.
If a number of wins for these teams bring them below the threshold, then the coach has saved themselves from being fired, and it resets.

column1: If the player activate corruption for a whole league or a division

The player then sets the level of frequency for corruption to occur, low, medium or high, again either on league level or division. So in the same league different divisions can have diffferente frequency of corruption.
The player then also set the intervall for amounts of points being deducted beginning of the season.
Span of points deductable could be for instance -3 to -12, then any team caught in corruption would start the following season with a random number of minus points in that span.
A random reason will then be picked from the list of corruption, and there will be a marker in the division table on the team that was caught, during the whole season.
If you hover over the marker, the reason for the corruption, and how many points are reduced for the team, is shown.
The list should be able to be accessed for me in an easy way to add and remove reasons
